rejected.subject: Colorado Department of Human Services
rejected.reason: Customer gets 'order already exists' error; agent investigates, asks for date range/site, then converts chat to Team Inbox ticket with no documented fix.
rejected.citation: let me take a look, one moment please ... Take to Team Inbox

rejected.subject: Littleton Public Schools / Production Ordering Glitch
rejected.reason: Production order pulling incorrect production dates; resolved on a phone call with no documented outcome captured in the ticket.
rejected.citation: I had a call with district and will walk over to tell you what we came up with.

rejected.subject: South Washington County Schools - Assist with Lead Times
rejected.reason: Lead-time / delivery-day setup question taken to a phone call with no documented fix or guidance recorded.

rejected.subject: Portland: PE - Production Orders
rejected.reason: Customer reports staff must click Central Warehouse since an update; agent cannot reproduce and customer closes ticket unable to retest. Inconclusive, no fix.
rejected.citation: I did not.  The order pulled up without having to click on Warehouse.

rejected.subject: Fort Worth ISD - Production Tab Slowness
rejected.reason: Production tab slowness during audit prep resolved on its own; no reusable cause or fix.
rejected.citation: PRE is moving faster today and everything we needed last week for the audit has been completed.

rejected.subject: SPPS Gluten Free Bread Ordering
rejected.reason: Item won't add to production order; agent reply inconclusive and ticket ends on an internal note of troubleshooting questions with no answer.
rejected.citation: I am not seeing anything that would prevent them from adding the item to their production orders.

rejected.subject: MADISON METROPOLITAN SCHOOL DISTRICT / Order amount different from plans
rejected.reason: Customer asks why production order qty differs from plan, then defers without providing an example; chat ends with no diagnosis or fix.
rejected.citation: I have to do another order today so I think I'll reach back out when I've got more info to share.

rejected.subject: Belton ISD / Animal error when doing orders
rejected.reason: Sporadic 'animal error' when adding items; agent cannot identify cause, error does not recur, no concrete fix captured.
rejected.citation: I am not able to see anything from this side that would indicate what specifically is causing the error.

rejected.subject: Online 3 - Boulder Valley School District - Inventory reports
rejected.reason: Customer asks which reports show enough inventory to fulfill orders; agent gives generic note on how production orders calculate and asks for site/day, then thread trails off with no report named.
rejected.citation: Do you know what site, and what day they served the smoothies?
